_readme: Per-type and per-subtype frontmatter required-fields schemas for the growth-os vault. Source of truth: wiki/system/build-plans/phase-3a-tanks.md. Read by hooks/guards/frontmatter.ts. Phase 3a Rule 5 governs evolution: non-retroactive, no field-name aliasing, sub-type vocab is open.

type_lookup._readme: How the guard determines a note's type. Precedence: (1) top-level `type:` field if present, else (2) tags array containing exactly one `types/X` value. Multiple `types/X` tags or no type-axis tag and no `type:` field means the guard cannot classify; for Edit, advise; for Write, block.

universal_baseline._readme: Required on every note regardless of type. `tags:` must include at minimum the `types/*` and `source/*` axis values. `confidence/*` required only when the type schema below names it.

record._readme: A captured fact or observation. Static-ish.

entity._readme: A person, organization, tool, or place referenced from other notes.

idea._readme: A concept, framework, insight, or learnable. Content evolves.

commitment._readme: A decision, rule, or commitment. Highest-stakes type.

process._readme: A workflow, pipeline, or procedure. Operational content that evolves.

navigation._readme: A hub, index, or navigation aid. Pointer-only content.

subtype_unlocks._readme: Sub-type-specific required fields and closed vocabs. Each entry's `applies_when` clause must all match for the unlock to fire. Keys are descriptive only; the guard iterates entries and matches on `applies_when`.

idea_framework._readme: Depth-metadata fields are required; schema declared by reference at ~/.claude/skills/scott-learn/references/depth-schema.md. Phase 3a names the rule; scott-learn owns the field set. The guard does not enforce the depth-metadata field set itself; that is a scott-learn-skill concern.

commitment_phase_plan._readme: re-open-trigger required only when phase-status is re-opened. The guard treats this as a conditional required field via the conditional_required_fields key below.

conditional_required_fields._readme: Fields required only when another field has a specific value. Each entry: when the trigger field/value matches, the listed fields must be present.

tag_axis_vocabs._readme: Closed vocabularies for tag axes per Phase 1 Item 4. Used to validate `types/X`, `source/X`, `confidence/X` tag values when present.

format_conventions._readme: Phase 3a Rule 4 mechanical format conventions. The guard validates field-name shape; field-value format checks (date format, etc.) are advisory in this version.

forbidden_link_fields._readme: Phase 3a Rule 3: inter-note relationships live in body wikilinks and prose. These frontmatter fields are forbidden. Block on Write or Edit that introduces them.

scope._readme: Path scope for the frontmatter guard. Only files matching one of these prefixes (relative to $HOME) are validated. Daily notes are excluded because their schema is operational, not Phase 3a-governed.
